attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY , 
CASE WHEN WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY , 
CASE WHEN WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT, 
WI.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, 
WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, 
WI.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
WI.DV_CHARGES_FLG, 
WI.DV_MISC_FLG, 
WI.DV_SERVICE_FLG, 
WI.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
WI.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
WI.DV_REVENUE_FLG, 
WI.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
WI.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY, 
WI.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID, 
WI.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID, 
WI.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, 
WI.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, 
WI.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY, 
WI.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY, 
WI.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
WI.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
WI.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_PF_QTR_IND_ADJ_ME WI
